{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Truegold elders
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A team of sixteen [[Truegold elders]] is working with [[scripts]] and [[natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
